content:
My exact workflow — including every prompt I use — for going from blank page to published article faster than you ever thought possible.

4 min read
Just now

--

I used to spend 6 hours on every Medium article. Research, outline, draft, edit, re-edit, second-guess the title — then finally hit publish feeling vaguely disappointed. Now? I’m done in under two hours. Every single time. Here’s the workflow, the prompts, and the exact income model I built on top of it.
Let me be direct with you: this isn’t about replacing your voice. Claude won’t write for you — it writes with you. The ideas, the experiences, the authority are yours. Claude handles the structural labor: the outlines, the transitions, the editing passes that drain your creative energy before you’ve even started.
The result feels like your best writing, produced at twice the speed. And on Medium, speed is everything — the writers who publish consistently are the ones who build audiences.

The 5-Phase Workflow
Each phase uses a specific Claude prompt designed for that job. Don’t skip phases — they build on each other, and the quality of your final article depends on the foundation laid in Phase 1.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Pick your favourite title. Copy the brief. You now have a north star for everything that follows — and it took 20 minutes, not two hours of staring at a blank page.

“The writers who win on Medium aren’t the most talented. They’re the most consistent. Claude doesn’t replace your talent — it removes the friction that was stopping you from showing up.”
— From the Claude Practical Series, Day 2 of 10
Press enter or click to view image in full size

The Model: High-Volume Niche Authority
The Medium Partner Program pays based on reading time from members. More articles = more chances to earn. But quantity without quality gets you nowhere. This workflow gives you both — consistent volume at consistent quality — which is exactly what Medium’s algorithm rewards.
Here’s what becomes possible when publishing takes 2 hours instead of 6:
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Press enter or click to view image in full size

The Ghostwriting Layer
This is the fastest path to immediate income. Once you have this workflow running, you can deliver a polished 1,200-word Medium article for a client in under 2 hours. At $250 per article — a conservative rate for AI-assisted ghostwriting in 2026 — four articles per week generates $4,000/month.
Your pitch to clients is simple: “I deliver a research-backed, publication-ready Medium article in 48 hours, optimized for the Partner Program. Here are five examples.” You get clients from LinkedIn posts showcasing your own published articles. Your own Medium presence is your portfolio.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Press enter or click to view image in full size

The One Mistake That Kills Results
Writers try this workflow once, don’t love the first output, and conclude “Claude can’t write like me.” That’s backwards. Claude writes like the prompts you give it. The first article might need more of your touch. By the third, you’ve dialled in your voice prompts. By the tenth, the outputs feel like your first draft — not a starting point.
The writers who get the best results treat this as a skill to develop, not a vending machine to insert topics into. Invest two weeks in the workflow before you judge it. You’ll be astonished at where you land.
I publish one AI business playbook daily — follow me for tomorrow’s.
